title: Structs, Methods, Method Sets, Embedding, and Composition
description: A job scheduler needs explicit domain records, validated transitions, method behavior, and composition without accidental promotion. Learners cumulatively produce a validated job-domain model through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Design structs, field visibility, literals, zero states, comparison, and tags as explicit data contracts.
Choose value or pointer receivers from mutation, copying, nil behavior, consistency, and method-set evidence.
Predict method sets, implicit address-taking, interface satisfaction, and behavior of named pointer and value types.
